✦ Module 4 ✦

👑

The Royal Court

Court Cards Deep Dive

Court cards are the people cards of the tarot. They can represent actual people in your life, energies you are embodying, aspects of your own personality, or situations asking you to take on a particular approach. Learning to read court cards is one of the most transformative tarot skills you can develop.

✦ Learning Objectives

  • ✦ Understand the four court card ranks (Page, Knight, Queen, King) and what each represents
  • ✦ Identify court card personalities in real people and in yourself
  • ✦ Recognize when court cards represent the querent vs. another person
  • ✦ Use court cards confidently in character and personality readings

Understanding the Ranks

📜

Page

Earth of element

Student, messenger, beginner energy

⚔️

Knight

Air of element

Action-taker, seeker, intense focus

👸

Queen

Water of element

Inward mastery, nurturing, emotional intelligence

👑

King

Fire of element

Outward mastery, leadership, authority

Three Ways to Read Court Cards

✦

As a Person

The card represents an actual person in your life who embodies this archetype's energy and characteristics.

✦

As Yourself

The card reflects an aspect of your own personality, an energy you're embodying, or a quality you need to call forward.

✦

As a Situation

The card describes the approach or energy needed in a situation — act with Queen of Swords clarity, or Page of Cups openness.

The 16 Court Cards

📜 The Pages

Page of Wands

exploration · excitement · freedom · adventure · enthusiasm

Upright: Exploration, excitement, freedom, adventure, enthusiasm

What new passion or interest is stirring your enthusiasm and curiosity?

Page of Cups

creative opportunities · curiosity · possibility · dreaming

Upright: Creative opportunities, curiosity, possibility, dreaming

What creative or emotional inspiration is arriving as a sweet surprise?

Page of Swords

new ideas · curiosity · thirst for knowledge · new ways of communicating

Upright: New ideas, curiosity, thirst for knowledge, new ways of communicating

What new ideas and mental curiosities are you eager to explore and communicate?

Page of Pentacles

manifestation · financial opportunity · skill development · new job

Upright: Manifestation, financial opportunity, skill development, new job

What practical opportunities for learning and growth are you ready to pursue?

⚔️ The Knights

Knight of Wands

energy · passion · inspired action · adventure · impulsiveness

Upright: Energy, passion, inspired action, adventure, impulsiveness

Where is your fiery passion driving you, and how can you channel it wisely?

Knight of Cups

creativity · romance · charm · imagination · beauty

Upright: Creativity, romance, charm, imagination, beauty

How can you pursue your romantic and creative dreams with both heart and discernment?

Knight of Swords

ambitious · action-oriented · driven to succeed · fast-thinking

Upright: Ambitious, action-oriented, driven to succeed, fast-thinking

Where can you channel your mental drive and ambition in a focused, purposeful way?

Knight of Pentacles

hard work · productivity · routine · conservatism

Upright: Hard work, productivity, routine, conservatism

How can you apply steady, focused effort to bring your practical goals to fruition?

👸 The Queens

Queen of Wands

courage · confidence · independence · social butterfly · determination

Upright: Courage, confidence, independence, social butterfly, determination

How can you lead with warmth, confidence, and passionate determination?

Queen of Cups

compassionate · caring · emotionally stable · intuitive · in flow

Upright: Compassionate, caring, emotionally stable, intuitive, in flow

How can you honor both your deep empathy and your need for emotional self-care?

Queen of Swords

independent · unbiased judgement · clear boundaries · direct communication

Upright: Independent, unbiased judgement, clear boundaries, direct communication

How can you combine sharp intellect with compassionate communication?

Queen of Pentacles

nurturing · practical · providing financially · a working parent

Upright: Nurturing, practical, providing financially, a working parent

How can you create a nurturing, abundant environment for yourself and those you love?

👑 The Kings

King of Wands

natural-born leader · vision · entrepreneur · honour

Upright: Natural-born leader, vision, entrepreneur, honour

What bold vision are you ready to lead others toward with charisma and integrity?

King of Cups

emotionally balanced · compassionate · diplomatic

Upright: Emotionally balanced, compassionate, diplomatic

How can you lead from a place of emotional wisdom, compassion, and balance?

King of Swords

mental clarity · intellectual power · authority · truth · ethical

Upright: Mental clarity, intellectual power, authority, truth, ethical

How can you lead with clarity, truth, and the highest ethical standards?

King of Pentacles

wealth · business · leadership · security · discipline · abundance

Upright: Wealth, business, leadership, security, discipline, abundance

How can you build sustainable wealth and security through disciplined, visionary leadership?

🎯 Activity: Court Card Mirror

Separate all 16 court cards from your deck. Spread them face up and answer these questions:

  1. Which court card most represents YOU right now?
  2. Which court card represents someone important in your life?
  3. Which court card energy do you most need to call in?
  4. Which court card do you resist or find most challenging?

💬 Discussion Prompts

  • Q:Which court card most represents you right now? Why?
  • Q:How do different court card energies show up in your relationships?
  • Q:Which court card archetype do you aspire to embody?
